revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出雲神社]]
'''Izumo Shrine''' (出雲神社)
* {{ill|Izumo-taisha|en|Izumo-taisha|qid=Q696362|lt=Izumo Taisha|1=Izumo-taisha}} – Located in {{ill|Izumo, Shimane|en|Izumo, Shimane|qid=Q825166|lt=Izumo, Shimane|1=Izumo, Shimane}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Izumo-daijingū|en|Izumo-daijingū|qid=Q10896675|lt=Izumo-daijingū|1=Izumo-daijingū}} – Located in {{ill|Kameoka, Kyoto|en|Kameoka, Kyoto|qid=Q633996|lt=Kameoka, Kyoto|1=Kameoka, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Izumo Shrine (Tanba-Sasayama, Hyōgo)|ja|出雲神社 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Shrine (Tanba-Sasayama, Hyōgo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579320|1=Izumo Shrine (Tanba-Sasayama, Hyōgo)}} – Located in [[:en:Tanba-Sasayama|Tanba-Sasayama, Hyōgo]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, Haga-no. * {{ill|Izumo Shrine (Miyoshi, Tokushima)|ja|出雲神社 (三好市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Shrine (Miyoshi, Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Miyoshi, Tokushima|en|Miyoshi, Tokushima|qid=Q990371|lt=Miyoshi, Tokushima|1=Miyoshi, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, Minochō Tachino. * {{ill|Izumo Shrine (Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi)|ja|出雲神社（山口市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Shrine (Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579321|1=Izumo Shrine (Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi)}} – Located in {{ill|Yamaguchi (city)|en|Yamaguchi (city)|qid=Q207876|lt=Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi|1=Yamaguchi (city)}}, {{ill|Yamaguchi Prefecture|en|Yamaguchi Prefecture|qid=Q127264|lt=Yamaguchi Prefecture|1=Yamaguchi Prefecture}}, Tokuchi.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|出雲神社|version=102027384|comment=Imported full ja history}}
